response.justification: The candidate has roughly 19 years of hands-on software development experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, meeting the raw experience threshold. However, the role is a director-level IC focused on AI strategy, and the resume shows no track record of engineering leadership at that scope, no recognized AI expertise or AI-built products beyond recent MCP/agent tooling contributions, and no advanced degree in an AI-related field. The profile fits a strong senior/staff engineer, not a principal-level AI strategist advising executives and strategic customers.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, embedded, low-latency backend, and DevOps
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used by Green Map
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated director/principal-level scope, strategic advisory, or organization-wide technical leadership
AI experience is recent and tooling-focused; no recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms
Cloud experience is applied (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than platform-strategy depth the role requires

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC role
Long, diverse engineering experience with founder background
